---
title: "Example SaAH"
format:
  pdf:
    number-sections: true
    callout-appearance: simple
fontsize: 11pt
geometry: margin=1in
---

```{r}
groups <- read.csv("tesstSaAH.csv", sep = ";", header = TRUE)
names(groups)[[1L]] <- "ids"
groups[, 2:6] <- apply(groups[, 2:6], 2, as.numeric)

# Divide it on 3 groups
# 11, 11, 10
n_blocks <- data.frame(
  treatment = c(
    rep("mCherry", 11L),
    rep("Gq", 11L),
    rep("Gi", 10L) # Based on the excel file
  )
)

result <- Randomization::random_finite_assign(
  seed = 1234,
  groups = groups[, 2:6],
  design = n_blocks,
  max_iter = 1000L,
  ids = groups$ids,
)
df <- data.frame(
  id = result$unit_id,
  treatment = n_blocks$treatment,
  groups[result$unit_id, 2:6]
)
knitr::kable(df)
summary <- function(df, fct) {
  res <- tapply(df, df$treatment, function(b) {
    rs <- apply(b[, 3:7], 2, fct)
    rs[["across all"]] <- fct(unlist(c(b[, 3:7])))
    rs
  })
  data.frame(
    mCherry = res$mCherry,
    Gq = res$Gq,
    Gi = res$Gi
  )
}
# Means for D1-D5
means <- summary(df, mean)
knitr::kable(means)

# SDs for D1-D5
sds <- summary(df, sd)
knitr::kable(sds)
```
